overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban downtown. The scene features towering megastructures, elevated highways, neon signage, and moderate pedestrian activity during a sunny afternoon in Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined elevated sidewalk with red safety barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk following a pedestrian with red hair, passing by trees and street lamps

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red beanie walking ahead of ego at consistent pace

entered.detail: continuous red safety barrier running along the left side of the sidewalk
massive concrete elevated highway structure with support pillars
mature trees with green foliage lining the right side of the walkway
towering multi-level megastructure with industrial pipes and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit urban sidewalk bordered by red concrete barriers on the left and mature trees on the right. The camera follows a pedestrian with a red beanie walking ahead, with a massive elevated highway ramp and futuristic megastructure visible in the distance against a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed sidewalk passage with graffiti-covered retaining wall

events.description: enters shadow cast by elevated highway structure, reducing direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk passing close to a graffiti-covered wall on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in teal top walking ahead alongside a child

entered.detail: red concrete wall covered in large white graffiti text reading NO FUTURE and other tags
ground floor commercial spaces with neon signs including CALIENTE

segments.scene_description: The walkway narrows as the camera passes a prominent red wall covered in graffiti on the right. The trees fall behind as the path becomes more urban and enclosed, with street-level shops visible on the left and the elevated highway structure now casting shadows from the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional zone approaching major intersection under elevated highway

events.description: exits the enclosed graffiti passage into a more open intersection area with palm trees

agents.ego_description: approaching a busy intersection while passing other pedestrians, preparing to cross

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the approach to the intersection
distinctive angular glass building with geometric facade patterns
large vertical digital advertising display showing colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the camera exits the narrow passage, revealing palm trees and a distinctive triangular modern building ahead. The elevated highway now recedes to the left as the camera approaches a busy intersection with moving traffic and large digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection with crosswalk and commercial towers

events.description: waiting at intersection as vehicles pass, then proceeding with pedestrian crowd

agents.ego_description: navigating through a denser crowd at the intersection while crossing the street

notable_agents.action: muscular pedestrian in white tank top walking alongside ego

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing with red and yellow curb lines
street-level stores with awnings and outdoor seating areas

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a wide-open intersection bustling with pedestrians and dense vehicle traffic. The character crosses the street alongside a crowd, with the triangular modern building now visible in the distance to the right and commercial storefronts lining the left side of the expanded street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit urban corridor that transitions from a tree-lined sidewalk into a bustling, wide-open city intersection. It begins by following a pedestrian in a red beanie along a path bordered by red concrete barriers and mature trees, with a massive elevated highway and megastructure looming against a clear blue sky. As the camera moves forward, the walkway narrows and the greenery disappears, shifting into a more enclosed urban environment defined by a graffiti-covered red wall and the deepening shadows of the overhead highway. The scene then opens up as the camera exits this passage, passing palm trees and a triangular modern building before approaching a busy intersection filled with digital billboards. Finally, the camera enters the wide-open crossing, merging with a crowd of pedestrians and dense vehicle traffic amidst a landscape of commercial storefronts.
